text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Arima Kinen. Haru Urara is
frazzled by her own shaky and sweaty body.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that means she's taking this race
seriously. Finally realizing what taking something
seriously means...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She heads off to the race with the heartfelt goal
of taking home first place.
